title: Checkout and WLT payment-session handoff
functionalSlices: Create checkout intent from a valid cart
Final item, price, address and serviceability validation
Create an opaque WLT payment-session reference without transferring financial truth
Receive authenticated WLT events and store only reference and operational projection
Waiting, success, failure, expiry and cancellation states
Unknown provider outcome recovery and reconciliation

truthBoundary.dsh: cart/address/serviceability/pricing snapshots, checkout intent and operational payment projection
truthBoundary.wlt: payment session, authorization, capture, refund, settlement and ledger truth

closedDefects: WLT unknown outcome reconciliation could not attach a recovered payment session.
Checkout and coupon projections could commit partially for one WLT event.
WLT events had no durable tenant/session-scoped replay receipt.
Client checkout collapsed unknown, failed, expired and cancelled states into generic states.
Client checkout did not poll canonical DSH state after WLT handoff.
Operator monitoring lacked tenant visibility and reconciliation queue filters.
closurePolicy: READY_FOR_REVIEW is the maximum technical decision before the listed independent reviews. CLOSED_WITH_EVIDENCE must not be asserted from this file alone.
